description: Configure a 'Shock Protocol' ICU monitoring station in OpenICE for a patient with hemodynamic instability. The configuration requires a Multiparameter Monitor set to a Heart Rate of approximately 110 bpm, a Non-Invasive Blood Pressure (NIBP) device set to a Systolic Pressure of approximately 90 mmHg, and an Infusion Pump with an Infusion Rate greater than 10 mL/hr. Capture a screenshot of the Vital Signs clinical application showing the integrated data and write a status note to /home/ga/Desktop/shock_protocol_status.txt confirming the configuration and listing the current HR and BP values.
